name: mcp-gsc
description: Self-hostable MCP server for Google Search Console, with bring-your-own Google OAuth. Runs on Cloudflare Workers.

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: List every tool this server exposes and report whether your Google connection is currently authenticated.

tools.name: list_sites
tools.description: List the Search Console properties the connected Google account can access.

tools.name: query_search_analytics
tools.description: Impressions, clicks, CTR, and average position over a date range — broken down by query, page, country, device, date, or search appearance.

tools.name: inspect_url
tools.description: Google's URL Inspection report for a single page: index status, last crawl, mobile usability, rich-results eligibility, AMP.

tools.name: list_sitemaps
tools.description: All sitemaps submitted for a property, with submission/processing status and warning and error counts.

tools.name: add_site
tools.description: Add a Google Search Console property.

tools.name: delete_site
tools.description: Remove a Google Search Console property.

tools.name: submit_sitemap
tools.description: Submit a sitemap for a Search Console property.

tools.name: get_sitemap
tools.description: Retrieve the status and details of a submitted sitemap.

tools.name: identify_quick_wins
tools.description: Find high-impression queries ranking in positions 8 through 20.

tools.name: detect_cannibalization
tools.description: Find queries for which multiple pages compete in search results.

tools.name: detect_content_decay
tools.description: Identify pages with the largest recent organic traffic declines.

tools.name: request_indexing
tools.description: Request indexing for an eligible URL through the Google Indexing API.

tools.name: list_indexed_pages
tools.description: List pages with Search Console impressions as a proxy for indexed pages.

tools.name: compare_performance
tools.description: Compare search performance across two date ranges.

tools.name: weekly_digest
tools.description: Generate a plain-language weekly search performance digest with one recommended action.
